See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 99620 => 'Aktel', 99622 => 'Sky mobile', 99631258 => 'Sky mobile', 996312973 => 'Nur Telecom', 99650 => 'Nur Telecom', 996506 => 'Winline', 99651 => 'Katel', 99654 => 'Aktel', 99655 => 'ALFA Telecom', 99656 => 'Winline', 99657 => 'Sotel', 996600 => 'Sky mobile', 99670 => 'Nur Telecom', 99675 => 'ALFA Telecom', 99677 => 'Sky mobile', 99688 => 'ALFA Telecom', 99691 => 'Smart Connect', 996990 => 'ALFA Telecom', 996995 => 'ALFA Telecom', 996996 => 'Sky mobile', 996997 => 'ALFA Telecom', 996998 => 'ALFA Telecom', 996999 => 'ALFA Telecom', ];
